text:
There once lived an old goose named Geraldona.

Oh Geraldona.

One summer evening Geraldona heard voices calling her name.

"Hoooey!"

Justhoot!).

Those voices must've been berries.

Or maybe berries could speak?

That day Geraldona decided to fly.

Oh heavens.

Why would beans fly?

Because when Geraldona flew...

Wooby wooby.

They saw stars.



That summer Geraldona had lots of berries.

Or maybe berries loved her.

It didn't matter.

Because soon she knew beans wouldn't fly.

Oh beans why??

Just eat!

That's why.


That's why.

Just eat.

That summer Geraldona ate fruit.

And beans.



Maybe Geraldona shouldn't have.


That's just my opinion.



Then there were two beans.

Oh oh!


One flew south.

One flew west.


Why couldn't they stay friends?

That's life.

They settled west.

Those beans are lonely?

No.

That's why birds fly that way.

Oh.

Just go eat.

That
